name: wealth-intelligence-platform
description: Unified Wealth Intelligence Platform - Enterprise FinTech Monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently -n agg,equ,mf,web -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm run dev -w backend/aggregator-server" "npm run dev -w backend/equity-server" "npm run dev -w backend/mutual-fund-server" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend/equity-server && npm run build -w backend/mutual-fund-server && npm run build -w backend/aggregator-server && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.db:generate: npm run db:generate -w backend/aggregator-server && npm run db:generate -w backend/equity-server && npm run db:generate -w backend/mutual-fund-server
scripts.db:push: npm run db:push -w backend/aggregator-server && npm run db:push -w backend/equity-server && npm run db:push -w backend/mutual-fund-server
scripts.db:seed: npm run db:seed -w backend/equity-server && npm run db:seed -w backend/mutual-fund-server && npm run db:seed -w backend/aggregator-server
